label: Transparent aquamarine crystal motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Aquamarine transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an aquamarine crystal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural aquamarine beryl crystal cluster from a pegmatite seam, long hexagonal sea-blue transparent crystal columns, clear ice-white facets, pale mineral matrix at the base, fine internal veils, crisp prismatic edges, clean luxury identity, geological accuracy.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full crystal base and column tips without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry setting, no necklace, no fantasy magic glow, no ocean scene, no loose gemstones, no hand, no text, no watermark, no other minerals dominating.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Aquamarine light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Aquamarine", derived from an aquamarine crystal cutout from a pegmatite seam. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible clean luxury UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 4K-class high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, no frame around the canvas.
Required visible sections: Morphous Aquamarine, Aquamarine Crystal, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from sea-blue transparent beryl columns, clear ice-white facets, pale pegmatite matrix, faint mineral veils, and crisp prismatic edges. The board must read as aquamarine crystal, not generic blue SaaS, ocean resort, or glassmorphism kit.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: clean luxury system, 8px radius with slight prismatic cuts, ice-white surfaces, aquamarine primary actions, mineral-mist muted panels, deep teal ink, clear crystal borders, precise grid, subtle pegmatite grain texture, thin refractive divider accents.
Palette to show and use consistently: Ice White #f8fcfb, Deep Teal Ink #10292e, Aquamarine #4fb8c6, Sea Glass #a8dfe3, Clear Facet #e8f6f4, Pegmatite Mist #d9e8e4, Glacier Cyan #78cad3, Mineral Gray #6f8584, Tourmaline Shadow #28484d.
Constraints: no jewelry, no ocean waves, no beach imagery, no neon cyan, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Aquamarine", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Aquamarine dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Aquamarine". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the aquamarine crystal cutout from a pegmatite seam.
Canvas: wide 16:9 4K-class high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, no frame around the canvas.
Required visible sections: Morphous Aquamarine, Aquamarine Crystal, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve aquamarine active states, sea-glass facets, ice-white text, deep teal mineral surfaces, clear crystal-edge dividers, subtle pegmatite grain texture, clean luxury spacing, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as aquamarine crystal, not generic cyber blue or ocean dashboard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep teal ink background, tourmaline-shadow cards, ice-white foreground, aquamarine buttons, sea-glass charts, glacier-cyan focus rings, clear crystal borders, subtle faceted shadows and mineral speckle overlays.
Palette to show and use consistently: Ice White #f8fcfb, Deep Teal Ink #10292e, Aquamarine #4fb8c6, Sea Glass #a8dfe3, Clear Facet #e8f6f4, Pegmatite Mist #d9e8e4, Glacier Cyan #78cad3, Mineral Gray #6f8584, Tourmaline Shadow #28484d.
Constraints: no jewelry, no ocean waves, no beach imagery, no neon cyan, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Aquamarine".
